description: Single-event reference hook for UserPromptSubmit. Injects a [Lab Notebook context: timestamp=...] line on every prompt and writes a sentinel to /tmp/hook-fired-userpromptsubmit.log.

hooks.command: ts="$(date -u +%FT%TZ)"; printf '[Lab Notebook context: timestamp=%s]\n' "$ts"; printf '%s userPromptSubmit fired\n' "$ts" >> /tmp/hook-fired-userpromptsubmit.log
